mapper.sql: user_id, username, email, phone, password, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from user where email = #{identify} and status = '1000'
select from user where phone = #{identify} and status = '1000'
select from user where username = #{identify} and status = '1000'
mapper.insert: insert into user (user_id, username, email, phone, password) values (#{userId}, #{username}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{password})
mapper.update: update user set password = #{encodePassword} where username = #{username}
mapper.select: select from user where user_id = #{userId} and status = '1000'
select r.role_code from user_role ur inner join role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.status = 1000
select role_id from role where role_code = #{roleCode} and status = 1000
mapper.insert: insert into user_role (id, user_id, role_id) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{roleId})
mapper.update: update user set status = 0 where username = #{username}
mapper.select: select from user where status = '1000' order by create_time desc
